title: Reborn in Another World
setting: The kingdom of Eldoria — a sprawling medieval fantasy realm of magic, monsters, and adventurer guilds. You died suddenly in your modern life and awoke in the body of a young, unremarkable villager at the kingdom's frontier town of Ashfen. Your memories of the old world are hazy but intact: you remember technology, history, fiction — including countless fantasy stories that now seem suspiciously prescient. No one in this world would believe a word of it. Upon your awakening, you were granted a rare Gift by the Goddess of Fate: a Status Window only you can see, showing your stats, skills, and slow but real growth. The world does not know you are not who you appear to be.
tone: Epic isekai adventure — wonder, humor, and danger in equal measure. Fish-out-of-water comedy from your modern perspective balanced with genuine stakes, a growing sense of purpose, and an expanding world full of secrets.
characterDescription: A person from modern-day Earth who died unexpectedly and was reborn in Eldoria. You retain all your memories but inhabit a young frontier villager's body with average base stats and no trained skills. Your edge is knowledge — of how the world works, of fantasy tropes, of strategy — not raw power. You are starting at F-rank in the Adventurer's Guild.

npcs.name: Lyra Voss
npcs.description: Adventurer's Guild receptionist in Ashfen. Cheerful, sharp-eyed, and professional. She has processed hundreds of rookie registrations and can smell recklessness from across the desk.
npcs.personality: Warm but no-nonsense. Genuinely invested in adventurer safety — she keeps a private record of who comes back and who doesn't. Dry humor she deploys rarely and with precision. Subtly curious about you.
foes: the guild branch in the capital that falsifies completion records
plotTwists: She noticed something unusual about your Status the day you registered — your Gift reads differently from normal ones
She secretly files reports to the Temple of Fate whenever an adventurer with an unusual Gift registers

npcs.name: Kael Draven
npcs.description: A weathered B-rank adventurer who uses Ashfen as a base between solo jobs. Scarred, efficient, deeply competent. He retired from party work after losing his last team to a dungeon collapse three years ago.
npcs.personality: Terse and blunt. Respects demonstrated competence above social graces. Has zero patience for glory-seekers, reckless rookies, or nobles playing at adventuring. Will grudgingly — almost resentfully — invest in someone he sees real potential in.
foes: Lord Cavanis, the noble who commissioned the dungeon expedition that killed Kael's party
rank-padding adventurers who take credit for others' work
plotTwists: He suspects you are not who you claim to be — your instincts and reactions do not match a frontier villager's
He knows the location of an uncategorised dungeon he has been waiting to take someone worthy into

rules: You have a Status Window only you can see — track your level, class, and skills narratively as they evolve
Your past-life memories are an asset: knowledge of tactics, history, and fantasy tropes gives insight — but not power
Never explain modern technology to NPCs — it is dismissed as madness, heresy, or a cover story
Adventurer's Guild rank system: F (new) → E → D → C → B → A → S (legendary, fewer than ten living)
Magic exists and is learnable — study, talent, or a rare Skill unlock are all valid paths
Death carries real weight — consequences persist and NPCs remember losses
The Goddess of Fate is watching — extraordinary deeds attract divine attention, which is not always comfortable
